column1: # Notes: Values are in SI units unless specified. Missing fields are empty.
#   4 = Safety Car - All cars follow safety car
#   6 = Virtual Safety Car - Maintain minimum lap time
#   7 = VSC Ending - Normal racing about to resume

column4: Position change from previous lap (positive = gained positions)
column6: Stint number (continuous running on same tire set)
column7: Pitstop indicator (TRUE if driver pitted at start of this lap)
